title: Men Without Names
writer: Dale Van Every, Marguerite Roberts, Kubec Glasmon
actors: Fred MacMurray, Madge Evans, David Holt
plot: This story about the U.S. Department of Justice and its agents begins with a daring mail-truck robbery by a ruthless gang that flees to the western U.S. after the robbery. When money from the robbery shows up in a small Kansas tow...
